## Technical notes

## Data considerations

## UX considerations

Screens, CLI behaviour, API ergonomics, empty states, error states, and accessibility.

## Infrastructure and operations considerations

Runtime assumptions, CI/CD impact, environment requirements, observability, and recovery.
